mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD) R_NUM, A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, EC.CODE_NM AS POOL_CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ST_DT, 1, 12), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY"년" MM"월" DD"일" HH24"시" MI"분"') AS ST_YMD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ED_DT, 1, 12), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY"년" MM"월" DD"일" HH24"시" MI"분"') AS ED_YMD, A.STATUS_CD FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' WHERE A.STATUS_CD = 'Y' )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_POOL_M WHERE DI = #{di}

SELECT A.DI ,A.USR_ID ,A.ROLE ,A.PRIV_YN ,A.PRIV_DTTM ,A.QUAN_YN ,A.QUAL_YN ,A.DISQ_YN_1 ,A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_1 ,A.DISQ_YN_2 ,A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_2 ,A.NAME ,A.GENDER ,A.TEL_HP ,A.TEL_HOME ,A.BIRTHDAY ,A.ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE ,A.ADDR_HOME ,A.ADDR_HOME_DETAIL ,A.UNIV_CD ,(SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = A.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_CD_NM ,A.JOB_NM ,A.POSITION ,A.DEPT ,A.EMAIL ,A.ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE ,A.ADDR_JOB ,A.ADDR_JOB_DETAIL ,A.TEL_JOB ,A.RESUME_1 ,A.RESUME_2 ,A.EDU_DIV ,A.JOB_CD ,A.UNIV_DIV ,A.DEL_YN ,A.INPT_ID ,A.INPT_DT ,A.LAST_CHNRG_ID ,A.LAST_CHG_DT ,A.IP FROM EVA_POOL_M A WHERE A.DI = #{di}
SELECT DI ,USR_ID ,SEQ ,EDU_YM ,UNIV_CD ,UNIV_NM ,LOC_CD ,LOC_CD_NM ,DEG_CD ,DEG_CD_NM ,MAJOR ,DEL_YN ,INPT_ID ,INPT_DT ,LAST_CHNRG_ID ,LAST_CHG_DT FROM EVA_POOL_DEGREE WHERE DI = #{di}
SELECT DI ,USR_ID ,SEQ ,JOB_ST_YM ,JOB_ED_YM ,UNIV_CD ,UNIV_NM ,DEPT ,DEL_YN ,INPT_ID ,INPT_DT FROM EVA_POOL_FULLTIME_TEACHER WHERE DI = #{di}

SELECT A.DI ,A.USR_ID ,A.ROLE ,A.PRIV_YN ,A.PRIV_DTTM ,A.QUAN_YN ,A.QUAL_YN ,A.DISQ_YN_1 ,A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_1 ,A.DISQ_YN_2 ,A.DISQ_UNIV_CD_2 ,A.NAME ,A.GENDER ,A.TEL_HP ,A.TEL_HOME ,A.BIRTHDAY ,A.ADDR_HOME_ZIPCODE ,A.ADDR_HOME ,A.ADDR_HOME_DETAIL ,A.UNIV_CD ,(SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = A.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_CD_NM ,A.JOB_NM ,A.POSITION ,A.DEPT ,A.EMAIL ,A.ADDR_JOB_ZIPCODE ,A.ADDR_JOB ,A.ADDR_JOB_DETAIL ,A.TEL_JOB ,A.RESUME_1 ,A.RESUME_2 ,A.EDU_DIV ,A.JOB_CD ,A.UNIV_DIV ,A.DEL_YN ,A.INPT_ID ,A.INPT_DT ,A.LAST_CHNRG_ID ,A.LAST_CHG_DT ,A.IP FROM EVA_POOL_M A WHERE A.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND A.ROLE = 'A'
